Chip Explorer v2.0.3.0

run_v203_chip · iter-8 elite · committed silicon: chip_3 (n2 / 128×128 / mixed_full / 2.5 GHz)
Each chip in this elite uses the same committed silicon (chip_3, see bottom-left). Chips differ in their topology (how many node slots and how they're wired) and in the packaging + mapping sampled from a 40-leaf catalog. The performance locks (left, top) filter on the four PPA metrics; the supply-chain filters (left, bottom) filter on packaging-component choices — the substrate the future supply-chain overlay (lead-time / cost / supplier) will sit on. Drag the handles or click anywhere on a bar to engage a metric filter (padlock closes); click the padlock to release it (threshold value persists). Click a packaging value to cross it out — a hard exclusion that survives every other change.

Performance filters

Click or drag a bar to engage that metric's filter (padlock closes). Click the padlock to release.

Chiplet count

Filter by N — the number of chiplets wired into the chip. Click a value to cross it out. Empty values (zero count) mean no chip at that N survives the current filters or that N is physically infeasible at chip_3 silicon (e.g., N=7 and N=8 with the 2,500 mm² package cap).

Supply-chain filters

Filters by the chip's packaging signature — the mode of its slots' leaf packaging centroids. This is the substrate the supply-chain overlay (lead-time / cost / risk per component+supplier) will sit on.
Supply scenarios — one-click presets
All supply on No HBM4 No CoWoS / ucie_advanced Mature parts only

Champion chip (best surviving)

Committed silicon — 16 frozen binding knobs

Fixed at tape-out. Everything above varies on top of this.

Glossary

Workload
The inference regime the chip serves. prefill = LLM prompt processing (compute-bound). decode = token generation (memory-bound, latency-sensitive). mixed = blended serving.
Topology
The chip's wiring graph: shape (single, chain, ring, mesh, star, all_to_all) × node count (1-8). Determines how nodes communicate and how work composes.
Leaf
One cluster in the chiplet's external PCT tree, built on the 6 packaging non-binding columns. Each leaf is a coherent region of packaging configurations (e.g. "monolithic + HBM4 + 8 stacks + ucie_advanced + pcie5"). Mapping rides along on each leaf's member rows.
v_i
One of the 8 chip slots. Value = which leaf sits in that slot, or blank (= slot inactive for this topology's node count).
Packaging signature
A chip's modal packaging values across its non-blank slots. Computed for filtering only — the actual built chip samples a row from each leaf.
Committed silicon (chip_3)
The 16 binding knobs frozen across this entire run. Process node, PE array geometry, datapath, clock, etc. — the things that require a new mask to change.
